name: Fuji Corporation
summary: Fuji Corporation manufactures and sells electronic assembly equipment and machine tools in Japan and internationally. The company offers SMT equipment, including circuit boards for automobiles, medical devices, LED placement, mobile devices, home electronics, and communication and infrastructure devices, as well as sensors and modules. It also provides machine tools, such as DLFn modular production equipment, twin spindle lathe, horizontal CNC lathe, vertical NC lathe, milling cell machines, NC single purpose machines, and IoT solution systems. In addition, it provides compact multi joint robots, mobility support robots, atmospheric pressure plasma units, and public stocker systems, as well as contract manufacturing services. The company was formerly known as Fuji Machine Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fuji Corporation in April 2018. Fuji Corporation was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Chiryu, Japan.
